# Plug-flow reactor computational graph

```{python}
from casadi import SX, Function
import majordome as mj
import cantera as ct
import casadi as cs
```

```{python}
gas = ct.Solution("gri30.yaml")
```

```{python}
T_symbol = SX.sym("T")
P_symbol = SX.sym("P")
Y_symbol = SX.sym("Y", gas.n_species)
```

## Species thermodynamics

```{python}
species = gas.species()[0]
species
```

## Mixture thermodynamics

```{python}

```

## Reaction kinetics

```{python}

```

## Reactor model

```{python}

```

## Simulation

```{python}

```
